name: Tender Grilled Tri-Tip
recipeIngredient: 1 package Lipton onion soup mix (beefy flavor is best)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a sealable bag, combine all ingredients.
2. Allow the roast to marinate for approximately 1.5 hours or longer.
3. Place the roast on the grill, fat side down.
4. Grill the first side for 8 minutes.
5. Turn the roast and baste with remaining marinade.
6. Grill the second side for another 8 minutes.
7. Slice the roast into 1-2 inch thick slices. They will be rare.
8. Place the slices back on the grill for an additional 30 seconds to each side.
9. Serve the roast on a warmed plate.
This is the most tender tri tip I have ever tasted. It prompts me to use my propane grill in the middle of winter because it just doesn't do the same under the broiler!
